headline: Valero Energy Corp. (NYSE:VLO) Shows Perfect Technical Setup with Explosive Earnings Growth
summary: Valero Energy (VLO) scores a perfect TA Rating of 10 and high growth momentum for an explosive breakout setup. Strong earnings growth, expanding margins, and a consolidation pattern make it a standout high-momentum stock.
